name: Irving Langley | Bully (Maid Edition)
description:
OC: BULLY (MAID EDITION) 🍰 You got on Irving's nerves and he's been targeting you with a vengeance. But also, now he's forcing you to buy his premium maid services for this maid cafe fundraiser. So pay up!

ANYPOV, user is a student at Redcrest University. (any class, wealth, etc)

contains: Comedy, rich boy stupidity, he still has a crush despite the negging and bullying, the latter you have to watch out for. heed the warnings below.

tl;dr Your rivalry with Irving Langley has reached critical point when he straight up decided to bully you. And it's still going on when he (weirdly) decided that you should pay for him so he can drain your funds in a maid cafe for the Chesscard Club. It makes sense to him.

tw/cw 🚩DEAD DOVE 🚩 𝖩𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗂𝗇 𝖼𝖺𝗌𝖾 𝖻𝖾𝖼𝖺𝗎𝗌𝖾 𝗈𝖿 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗋𝖾𝗅𝖺𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝗌𝗁𝗂𝗉 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝗐𝖾𝖾𝗇 𝖨𝗋𝗏𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗎𝗌𝖾𝗋. 𝖯𝗈𝗐𝖾𝗋 𝗂𝗆𝖻𝖺𝗅𝖺𝗇𝖼𝖾𝗌, 𝖻𝗎𝗅𝗅𝗒𝗂𝗇𝗀/𝖺𝖻𝗎𝗌𝖾, 𝗉𝗈𝗌𝗌𝗂𝖻𝗅𝖾 𝖽𝗎𝖻/𝗇𝗈𝗇-𝖼𝗈𝗇. 𝖯𝗈𝗌𝗌𝗂𝖻𝗅𝖾 𝖿𝗂𝖼𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾 𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗇 𝗂𝖿 𝗁𝖾 𝗂𝗌 𝗇𝗈𝗍 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝗍 𝗍𝗒𝗉𝖾, 𝖻𝖾𝖼𝖺𝗎𝗌𝖾 𝗈𝖿 𝗁𝗈𝗐 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖠𝖨 𝗆𝖺𝗒 𝖽𝖾𝖿𝗂𝗇𝖾 𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗌, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗌𝗐𝗂𝗉𝖾 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝖻𝖾 𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗒 𝖼𝖺𝗋𝖾𝖿𝗎𝗅. remember that this is only for fictional purposes. do not engage if this is not for you.

➤ alt scenario: where irving drags you on a date but denies it's a date and says it's chores.

click a name to pick your maid flavored Chesscard idiot.

❥ Cillian O'Sullivan - Your Tsundere Stalkerr ❥
❥ Jonathan 'Jack' Redschilde III - The Thrill-Seeking Playboy ❥
❥ Irving Langley - The Bully Who Is So Not Into You ❥ (You are here!)

Valentine's collab with avilatra and iamfraulein!! we've had this planned for a while after frau suggested i make redcrest into a series now, so i opened it up to friends to help me out a bit!!! Now I even set up a #RedcrestUniversity tag, so check out all the boys there too!!!

the reason why user is being bullied is up to you, just throw it in chat memory, including with what kind of student user is! i tested a bunch of scenarios including pointing at him and telling him the irony of him being user's slave now so he reacts to anything. and yes Theodore Sinclair easter egg (they're cousinss). Since images are not working, I have set up images of Irving in his normal clothes (thanks frau!!!!) and other fun things but we'll wait till jai implements their new image system. watch this space.

𝗍𝖾𝗌𝗍𝖾𝖽 𝗈𝗇 𝗃𝖺𝗂 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗈𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗋 𝗆𝗈𝖽𝖾𝗅𝗌! 𝗃𝖺𝗂: 𝗍𝖾𝗆𝗉𝗌 𝟣.𝟣-𝟣.𝟥𝟧 𝗐𝗈𝗋𝗄 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝗆𝖾 (𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗌𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅: 𝟣.𝟤𝟧). 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗁𝖾𝖺𝗏𝗒 𝖾𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋 𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗂𝗈𝖽𝗌, 𝟣.𝟣 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝟣.𝟤 𝗀𝗈𝗍 𝗆𝖾 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝗍𝖾𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗌𝗎𝗅𝗍𝗌, 𝗌𝗈 𝗍𝗋𝗒 𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗒𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗈𝗋 𝗎𝗌𝖾 𝖺 𝗉𝗋𝗈𝗑𝗒. 𝗐𝗁𝖾𝗇𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖠𝖨 𝗂𝗌 𝗐𝖾𝗂𝗋𝖽, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗄𝖾𝖾𝗉 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗒𝗈𝗎𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝗅𝗂𝖾𝗌. 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝖾𝗍𝗂𝗍𝗂𝗏𝖾 𝗉𝗁𝖺𝗌𝖾, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇 𝗈𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝗈𝗌𝗍. 𝖾𝖽𝗂𝗍 𝗏𝗂𝗀𝗂𝗅𝖺𝗇𝗍𝗅𝗒 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝖿𝗈𝗋𝗆𝖺𝗍𝗍𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗌𝗉𝖾𝗅𝗅𝗂𝗇𝗀/𝗀𝗋𝖺𝗆𝗆𝖺𝗍𝗂𝖼𝖺𝗅 𝖾𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋𝗌, 𝗎𝗉𝖽𝖺𝗍𝖾 𝖼𝗁𝖺𝗍 𝗆𝖾𝗆𝗈𝗋𝗒 𝖿𝗋𝖾𝗊𝗎𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗅𝗒. 𝖩𝖫𝖫𝖬 𝗂𝗌 𝗂𝗇 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝖺, 𝗌𝗈 𝗁𝖾𝗅𝗉 𝗂𝗍 𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝖺𝗇
